raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ne dseuneetes zitteem
Deeweem paklat winneem kal-
poht/ un preeſch winneem pee-
lubgt/ un ne apkaitinajeet manni
zaur juhfo Rohku Darbu/ ka es
jums tauna ne darru.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet juhs utanni ne effat
kaufiſicht/ tafka tas KUNGS:
Tadeht ka juhs mannt apkaiti-
najat zaur juhfo Rohku Darbu/
jums paſcheem par Launu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tadeht ta fakka tas KUNGS irraid / ko Jeremijus pahr u
Zebaut: Tapehz ka juhs mannuſ ſeem ſcheem Laudim fluddin
Wahrdus ne effat klaufiſchli/
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Raagt/ tad fuhtischu es/
un nemſchu wiſſus Zittis no See-
meta-Pufkes/ tafka tas KUNGS:
Un uhs Nebukadnezaru /
to kehnitau no Babeles/ mannu
Kalpu/ un weddiſchu tahs pahr
ſcho Semmi/ un pahr winnas
Eedsihwotajeem / un pahr wiſ-
feem Laudim apfahrt/ un es te-
deldeſchu tohg/ un darriſchu tohg
par pohstu Weetu/ un par Ap-
jneekli/ un muhſchigt pohsta.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un es liſſchu no teem iſ-
nthkt wiſſu Balti ta Preekſa/ un
wiſſu Lihtsmibas Balkſni/ wiſ-
fu Balti ta Bruhdgana/ un wiſ-
fu Balkſni tahs Bruhtes/ tahs
Dſirnawaß Klabbinaſchanu/ un
tahs Lukts Spihdumu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un wiſſa tcht Semme
laps par pohstu Weetu/ un par
Iſtruhzinaſchanu. Un ſchee Lau-
dis Kalpoht tain Kehntman no
weles feptiadefmits Gaddus.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet kad tee fepti
mits Gaddt buhs peepiditti
veemeklefchu es pee ta Keh-
no Babeles/ un pee ſcheem
dint/ tafka tas KUNGS/
no Noseegumu; tapatt pee
Kaldeeru Semmes.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un darrifchu to par m
ſchigahm pohſtahn Weetab
un es weddiſchu pahr ſcho S
mi wiſſus mannuſ Wahrd
fo es pahr to eſmu runnajs/
tn/ taß tchaß Grahmata raksti
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tee liſſees no winne
kalpoht/ kas ir warrenas T
tas/ un leelt Kehnini irr.
tamakſachu es teem pehz win
Darbeem/ un pehz winno R
ku Darbeem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Jo ta irr tas KUNGS
tas Ifraeta Deews us man
lozzijs: Jemme ſcho Bikkert
Wiyna tahs Bahrsibas no ma
nas Rohkas/ un dohdt to de
wiſſeem Laudim/ pee ka es ter
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ka tee dserx/ ſtrafpale/
traffo ta Sohbina deht / ko
wiſſan Starpa fuhtischu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un es jehmur to Bikkert
no ta KUNGA Rohkas/
dewu wiſſeem Laudim dsert/p
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Prohti Jeruſalemei / u
teem Puſſahteem no Juha/u
winnas Kehntaeem/ un winna
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
